name: Æblerov - Over Hegnet (Organic)
description: A new take on Nordic cider. Over Hegnet is an ultra-juicy, refreshing cider made with organic Danish apples sourced from Tvedemose, a regenerative farm in Lundby located in the southern part of Zealand. name: To Øl Gift Card
description: We have your gifting needs covered with our digital-only gift cards, the perfect gift for anyone but especially that special someone. NOTE: These gift cards can only be used on the To Øl webshop. The cards are sent by email and are not a physical product.

name: Implosion Bundle
description: The Implosion Bundle gives you all the whole range of our award-winning alcohol free beer, offered for a special low price. name: Implosion Pink Sour
description: This is a non-alcoholic kettle soured beer flavored with lychee and hibiscus. Hopped with loral and ekuanot to play up the floral nature of the lychee, and pink from hibiscus and purple carrot.

name: Implosion Amber Lager
description: Malt-forward amber lager that doesn't taste like a compromise. Loosely based on our Driving Home from Xmas, which was itself loosely based on the 45 Days Vienna Lager — this is a malt-forward beer with a good amount of Vienna and Munich malts doing the work.
